Motion To Compel The Production Of Docs
Off Calendar May-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ray Sowards, Esq. (888.435.8884; rsowards@pacbell.net) for Plaintiff.
Richard Antognini, Esq. (916.295.4896; rlalawyer@yahoo.com) Defendant in propria persona.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SPIELBAUER LAW OFFICE's Motion To Compel The Production Of Docs is denied as moot. Request for sanctions is denied without prejudice.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RAY W. SOWARDS, Esq. (Tel: 888-435-8884) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SPIELBAUER LAW OFFICE's Motion To Compel.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for plaintiff (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter discussed. Matter submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, as follows:

Motion is granted. Request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $1910.20 against Defendant Richard Antognini in the amount of $1,910.20. Unopposed. Discovery responses to be produced on or before March 31, 2022.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
